---
title: "Changelog"
description: "Full UIAO release history — rendered from the canonical CHANGELOG.md at the repo root."
categories: [meta]
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical source
This page renders the canonical
[`CHANGELOG.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
at the repository root.
:::

{{< include ../../CHANGELOG.md >}}
